case_title: BASSETT MARY L VS JACKSON MARIA

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,023.00 FILED BY BASSETT MARY L AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-1990 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BASSETT MARY L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON MARIA $1,023.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,031.00, 1976 HAYES STREET APT B SAN FRANCISCO CA 94117 WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL ISSUE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON MARIA
